name: baby cot
description: The client is a young single mother who will be delivering anytime. She has no income at the moment due to pregnancy, and there is also minimal help from the family that is also struggling financially. She is appreciative if she can have a baby cot for her baby.

passiton.name: Baby cot
passiton.description: Baby cot in good condition with slight used marks.
passiton.location: Amber Road, East Coast, Joo Chiat, Katong, Marine Parade, Meyer, Tanjong Rhu

passiton.name: Bonbijou S3 playpen baby cot
passiton.description:
Bonbijou S3 playpen baby cot

(Do not request if you can't do self-collect with no fee - this playpen is heavy and I can't carry myself to take train and send to you.)

(We are working parents or if you tends not to reply then we would appreciate if you kindly skip our post. Only contact through email or WhatsApp - NO PHONE CALL. Thank you.)

name: Wardrobe
description:
The client is a single mother caring for her 14-year-old son and currently resides in a rental flat. She is presently unemployed as she has been certified medically unfit for work. The client requires a cabinet or wardrobe for proper storage of clothing, as she currently lacks adequate storage space in the home.

She is seeking donations for this essential household item, which would support her in maintaining a more organised and functional living environment and help improve her and her son’s daily living conditions. This would be limited due to client's strained financial situation.

contact.org: Allkin Family Service Centre @ Ang Mo Kio 230
contact.name: Norsiah Binte Mohd Basir

name: Wardrobe
description: A 27-year-old woman has recently left an abusive marriage after her PPO had been approved and is starting over in a rental flat. She is working a daily-paid warehouse job and is also managing loans due to past financial exploitation. She is currently in need of a wardrobe for clothes to help her settle into her new home.

contact.org: Allkin Family Service Centre @ Cheng San 445
contact.name: Nur Ain Afini Binte Hamdan

name: Wardrobe
description: Client is a single mother who is taking care of her 3 young children. Due to her poor health and caregiving duties, she is currently unemployed. Family is allocated a rental flat recently and require household items for their flat. Client hopes to receive wardrobe to put her and her children's clothes.

contact.org: Allkin Family Service Centre @ Cheng San 445
contact.name: Nur Ain Afini Binte Hamdan

name: Wardrobe
description:
Hi all, a single mother and her 10 years old son are currently staying at a transitional shelter, and they have just gotten their HDB rental flat at Sembawang. Their HDB rental flat is currently empty and they need a wardrobe. The mother has just started part-time work, and she is unable to afford a wardrobe. Please contact me at 89638006 or derek_lim@awwa.org.sg if you would like to donate or contribute a wardrobe (still in good, working condition) to them. We do not have any transport for the wardrobe. Thank you so much!

Best regards,
Derek Lim
Social Worker
AWWA

name: Single-size Mattress
description: Client lives in a rental flat and has 3 young children who are currently using bedding that is worn and no longer in suitable condition. This may be affecting their overall health, quality of rest, and school attendance. We are therefore reaching out to seek support from anyone who may be able to provide the family with 3 single mattresses. These items would help improve the children’s sleeping conditions, contributing positively to their overall well-being and daily functioning.

contact.org: Care Corner Family Service Centre - Admiralty
contact.name: Shanell Tan

passiton.name: Single Sized Mattress
passiton.location: Ardmore, Balmoral, Bukit Timah, Grange Road, Holland Road, Orchard Boulevard, Tanglin

name: Wardrobe
description: Clt, elderly male, had recently completed a declutter at home, and requires some replacement of furniture.

name: Wardrobe
description:
The client is currently pregnant and has three children, of whom two are attending primary school and one is an infant. The client is temporarily unable to continue working due to discomfort experienced during her pregnancy.

The client’s husband is currently working long hours in a physically demanding job and faces difficulties in securing better‑paying employment due to his incarceration history.

The family will be moving into a new rental flat soon, however, their current income is insufficient for them to purchase the necessary furniture (wardrobe) to move into the new flat.

contact.org: MWS Covenant Family Service Centre – Hougang and Buangkok
contact.name: Odelia Tan

name: Wardrobe
description: Client is the primary caregiver to her six children ranging between 2 months to 17 years old. The household resides in a 2-room HDB public rental flat. With the family receiving financial assistance that only covers their basic needs, client hopes to seek additional support to replace some of their furniture (wardrobe) that is in a debilitating condition.

contact.org: MWS Covenant Family Service Centre – Hougang and Buangkok
contact.name: Odelia Tan

name: Wardrobe
description: Elderly client has just moved into his rental flat and he needs assistance with furnishing his flat. He currently does not have a wardrobe for his clothes.

name: Wardrobe
description: Client is married with four children. Client’s husband is the sole breadwinner. Their donated sliding door wardrobe has been used for years is spoilt and need a replacement.

name: Wardrobe
description: Client, who is in his early 20s, has been diagnosed with stage 4 cancer and is undergoing chemotherapy. His wife is his full-time caregiver therefore, they are both unable to work full-time for now. Due to some issues with their families, they have to move out of their homes. They are about to get the keys to their 1-room rental flat but do not have any furniture or appliances. They require assistance in getting a wardrobe to store their clothes as their current wardrobe does not belong to them and are unable to bring it with them to their new home.

contact.org: Allkin Family Service Centre @ Cheng San 445
contact.name: Nur Ain Afini Binte Hamdan
